name: Integration - OpenAI and Azure Search Client Creation
description: Verifies that Config.get_openai_client() and Config.get_search_client() create clients when environment variables are set, and raise errors otherwise.
input: Set all required environment variables and call both methods; then unset one and call again.
output: Client objects are returned when variables are set; RuntimeError is raised when missing.
success_criteria: Client object is returned when variables are present
RuntimeError is raised with appropriate message when variables are missing
